ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the cycle */,
  "traditional_scenario" INTEGER /* Indicates if the operation was traditional */,
  "num_autonomous_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of autonomous bikes in operation */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life of the autonomous bikes in milliseconds */,
  "pickup_speed" REAL /* Pick-up speed of the bikes in km/h */,
  "num_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars present during the cycle */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent managing the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charging station used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the cycle */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the cycle */,
  "duration_min" REAL /* Duration of the cycle in minutes */,
  "start_battery_percent" REAL /* Battery percentage at the start of the cycle */,
  "end_battery_percent" REAL /* Battery percentage at the end of the cycle */,
  "battery_gain_percent" REAL /* Percentage gain in battery life during the cycle */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled by the bike during the cycle */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the bike during the cycle */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the cycle */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the cycle */,
  "num_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who used the bike during the cycle */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from users about the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycles_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycles_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the service */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the agent's last activity */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the agent based on performance and user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the charging station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the charging station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the charging station (number of bikes it can charge) */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "occupied_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently being charged at the station */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance for the station */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the station (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Total battery capacity of the bike in mAh */,
  "current_battery_percent" REAL /* Current battery percentage of the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., active, inactive, in maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the bike */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance for the bike */,
  "last_charging_date" TEXT /* Date of the last charging session */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike since deployment */,
  "total_cycles" INTEGER /* Total number of cycles the bike has completed */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cycle related to this statistics record */,
  "num_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips taken during the cycle */,
  "average_trip_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips in minutes */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the cycle in km */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed achieved during the cycle */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed achieved during the cycle */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed during the cycle */,
  "user_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Average user satisfaction score for the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery log entry */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bike being logged */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cycle during which the log was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logging event */,
  "battery_percent" REAL /* Battery percentage at the time of logging */,
  "battery_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the battery at the time of logging */,
  "charging_status" TEXT /* Status of the battery (e.g., charging, discharging, idle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_logs_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "downtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Downtime in minutes due to maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bike being charged */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charging station used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the charging session in minutes */,
  "start_battery_percent" REAL /* Battery percentage at the start of the session */,
  "end_battery_percent" REAL /* Battery percentage at the end of the session */,
  "energy_charged" REAL /* Amount of energy charged during the session */,
  "charging_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the charging session (percentage) */,
  "session_cost" REAL /* Cost of the charging session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the charging session (e.g., completed, interrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Rating of the user based on behavior and feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
